name: browser-youtube-play-all
description: Adds "Play All" buttons for Videos, Shorts, and Streams on YouTube, with sorting by Latest, Popular, or Oldest.

scripts.setup: bun i && wxt prepare && bunx playwright install chromium firefox
scripts.test: bun run build && bunx playwright test tests/e2e
scripts.test-specs: bun run build && bunx playwright test tests/specs
scripts.test-ui-mode: bun run build && bunx playwright test --ui
